name: Scenario 6: Contract Pricing Calculations - Consistent (Expected PASS)

Ingredient cost calculation validated: (Average Wholesale Price (AWP) * (1 - Discount_Percentage)) = 85.00. Dispensing fee and sales tax calculations added to produce the correct Final Allowed Amount of 87.50. Patient Copay + Plan Paid equals the Allowed Amount, confirming accurate reimbursement.
